creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Mickael,

Thanks for your contribution ! Please can you check that the attached patch is 
OK ? It is a modified version of your patch with the following changes :

- removed empty patches
- removed useless LICENSE_FILE (the license is a standard GPLv2)
- removed useless PORTREVISION

If so, I'll apply this one.

Best regards,

-- 
Ganael LAPLANCHE <ganael.laplanche@martymac.org>
http://www.martymac.org | http://contribs.martymac.org
FreeBSD: martymac <martymac@FreeBSD.org>, http://www.FreeBSD.org
